title: SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-335 XOrg Server SyncAwaitFence Use-After-Free Privilege Escalation Vulner
id: 046206a5-d419-5991-842a-ec485312a37c
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to ZDI-26-335: X.Org Server SyncAwaitFence Use-After-Free Privilege Escalation Vulnerability (Web Application).

    Severity: LOW | Class: PRIVESC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/ZDI-26-335: X.Org Server SyncAwaitFence Use-After-Free Privilege Escalation Vulnerability

date: 2026/06/10
modified: 2026/06/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_token:
        EventID:
            - 4672
            - 4673
        PrivilegeList|contains:
            - 'SeDebugPrivilege'
            - 'SeImpersonatePrivilege'
            - 'SeTcbPrivilege'
    selection_newservice:

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-335: X.Org Server SyncAwaitFence Use-After-Free Privilege Escalation Vulnerability — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-10T03:55:52Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "ZDI-26-335: X.Org Server SyncAwaitFence Use-After-Free Privilege Escalation Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-335: X.Org Server SyncAwaitFence Use-After-Free Privilege Escalation Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - PRIVESC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7852691; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: PhoenixStorybook: Unauthenticated remote code execution via HEEx template injection in phoenix_storybook playground
items.description:
### Summary
An unsafe HEEx template generation vulnerability allows any unauthenticated user to execute arbitrary code on the server. The phoenix_storybook playground accepts user-controlled attribute values over WebSocket and interpolates them unsanitized into a HEEx template that is subsequently compiled and evaluated with full Elixir `Kernel` access.

### Details
The vulnerability is a three-step chain:

**1. Unsanitized WebSocket input (`extra_assigns_helpers.ex`)**
The `psb-assign` event handler in `PhoenixStorybook.Story.PlaygroundPreviewLive` accepts arbitrary attribute names and values from unauthenticated WebSocket clients and  stores them verbatim via `ExtraAssignsHelpers.handle_set_variation_assign/3`.

**2. Unescaped interpolation into HEEx (`component_renderer.ex`)**
`ComponentRenderer.attributes_markup/1` builds a HEEx template string by interpolating binary attribute values directly:
```elixir
{name, val} when is_binary(val) ->
  ~s|#{name}="#{val}"|
```
No escaping of `

items.description: Hackers exploit CVE-2026-3300 in Everest Forms Pro to inject PHP via form fields, creating rogue admin accounts. 29,300 attempts blocked. Researcher h0xilo submitted a flaw in Everest Forms Pro for WordPress, tracked as CVE-2026-3300, to Wordfence’s bug bounty program and earned $325 for it. WPEverest patched the flaw on March 18. items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-342 Progress Software Kemp LoadMaster apiuser Uninitialized Memory Remote
id: 084d248f-2299-53d0-87dd-e5406847b4d4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to ZDI-26-342: Progress Software Kemp LoadMaster apiuser Uninitialized Memory Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/ZDI-26-342: Progress Software Kemp LoadMaster apiuser Uninitialized Memory Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/10
modified: 2026/06/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-342: Progress Software Kemp LoadMaster apiuser Uninitialized Memory Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-10T03:55:52Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "ZDI-26-342: Progress Software Kemp LoadMaster apiuser Uninitialized Memory Remote Code Execution Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-342: Progress Software Kemp LoadMaster apiuser Uninitialized Memory Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4475535; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.description: Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs

ioc_paywall.message: 8 IOC(s) at 56.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs
id: 6261d4cf-97a0-5ccc-80aa-1d97ca4c191c
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/10
modified: 2026/06/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-10T03:55:52Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Microsoft Releases Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday With 208 CVEs Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4051223; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Remote Code Execution - critical severity (Risk 9.0/10). [ALERT] CISA KEV CONFIRMED - actively exploited in the wild. Patch immediately. EPSS 9.47% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1059, T1548, T1190, T1203 (4 techniques). 8 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-RAN. AI confidence: MODERATE (68%) - partial intelligence corroboration.
